So if you have the time and the patience to deal with traffic, this is a great way to get an overview of the best of the city.  This route takes you to most of the historic and beautiful parts of town.  But beware that the traffic delays can be horrible.

We only found out about this route while visiting twin peaks and ended up following the route with few short cuts.  Its well planned for visitors to see San Francisco.  Also, we did drive it on the weekend so it took a while and it was quite busy to navigate.  But we did see many landmarks which we would have not bothered to drive to.
